preferred_ctas: [CTA EXAMPLE 1 — e.g. 'DM me "SYSTEM" and I'll send you the full breakdown.']

notes: [DESCRIBE CTA PHILOSOPHY — e.g. 'CTAs are short, direct, and low-friction. Strong preference for keyword-triggered DMs to filter intent.
